tbox.st: Joint Resolution Amending Rules Relating to the Practice of Law

lt.gd: This joint resolution amends rules relating to the practice of law.
lt.hp: This resolution:amends the Utah Code of Judicial Administration to address fees imposed by the Utah Supreme Court with regard to the practice of law.
lt.oc: Other Special Clauses:This resolution provides a special effective date.
lt.pa: Utah Code of Judicial Administration:AMENDS:Rule 14-102, Utah Rules of Judicial Administration

leg.enact: Be it resolved by the Legislature of the state of Utah, two-thirds of all members elected to each of the two houses voting in favor thereof:As provided in Utah Constitution Article VIII, Section 4, the Legislature may amend rules of procedure and evidence adopted by the Utah Supreme Court upon a two-thirds vote of all members of both houses of the Legislature:

section.secline: Section 1. Rule 14-102, Utah Rules of Judicial Administration is amended to read:

catline.bold: Rule 14-102. Regulating the practice of law.

sectionText.amend: As provided in Utah Constitution, Article VIII, Section 4, this resolution takes effect upon a two-thirds vote of all members elected to each house.
